drops.quantity: Abhorrent spectres now have a 50% elemental weakness to wind spells.
drops.rate: Abhorrent spectres now have a 50% elemental weakness to wind spells.

drops.quantity: Superior slayer monsters are now guaranteed to drop brimstone keys when on a task from Konar.
The abhorrent spectre was given a graphical update to be more distinguishable from their regular variant.

infobox.examine: Some of its features are worryingly human.
Its only purpose is to protect and repair.

drops.quantity: Abyssal demons now drop abyssal ashes in place of regular ashes.
Abyssal Demons in the Slayer Tower Basement will now count towards the Morytania Achievement Diary.
Abyssal Demons have had the abyssal dagger added to their drop table with a drop rate of 1/32k.
More Abyssal demon spawns have been added to the Slayer Tower.
The most southern Abyssal Demons in the Slayer Tower have been moved north marginally to prevent them from leaving their room.

infobox.examine: It seems to have eyes in the back of its head...
A blood-drinking denizen of the Abyss.
A blood-drinking denizen of the Abyss.
A portal has opened into the Abyss!
• A higher order of abyssal demon.• It's disoriented... for now.

drops.quantity: Added a 2/139 drop of 220-270 aether catalyst, and to compensate made coal more rare, from 6/139 to 4/139.
Scions melee max hit has been decreased from 15 to 10.

The Abyssal Sire no longer fully heals when defeated too quickly during phase transitions.
If the Sire is killed while walking to begin phase 2, it will restore to 40% health.
If the Sire is killed while walking to begin phase 3, it will restore to 20% health.
drops.rate:
The Abyssal Sire no longer fully heals when defeated too quickly during phase transitions.
If the Sire is killed while walking to begin phase 2, it will restore to 40% health.
If the Sire is killed while walking to begin phase 3, it will restore to 20% health.

drops.quantity:
The lung phase has been shortened.
Abyssal Sire is now targetable during its transition phases.
Abyssal Sire's speed has been increased to match the player's running pace.
Implemented a minimum hit of 50% of your weapon’s max hit, allowing end-game setups to one-phase the vents more reliably.
Demonbane weapons are now able to one-shot vents.
Increased Sire’s Hitpoints by 25 and introduced a 50% damage reduction during its transition phases, to balance out the above changes.
Removed some blocking terrain in the centre of the arena.
Scions defence has been reduced from 80 to 50.
Spawns defence has been reduced from 30 to 10.
Demonbane weapons are now guaranteed to hit spawns.
drops.rate:
The lung phase has been shortened.
Abyssal Sire is now targetable during its transition phases.
Abyssal Sire's speed has been increased to match the player's running pace.
Implemented a minimum hit of 50% of your weapon’s max hit, allowing end-game setups to one-phase the vents more reliably.
Demonbane weapons are now able to one-shot vents.

Removed some blocking terrain in the centre of the arena.
Scions defence has been reduced from 80 to 50.
Spawns defence has been reduced from 30 to 10.
Demonbane weapons are now guaranteed to hit spawns.

drops.quantity: Abyssal Sire now drops abyssal ashes in place of regular ashes.
Miasma pools will no longer deal damage after the Abyssal Sire has died.
The Abyssal Sire will now be re-stunned correctly when autocasting shadow spells.

Players no longer deal "lost" hits and the Abyssal Sire transitions when expected during phases.
The Abyssal Sire can now be re-stunned with Shadow spells during the first phase while it is still stunned.
Players can now stun the Abyssal Sire to begin the fight, rather than attacking it once and then stunning it. However, the Sire must still complete its waking up animation. In order to do this the stunning of the Sire is not instant, and can result in the player being attacked by the tentacles if they approach the vents too quickly.
The Abyssal Sire can now be slain as part of an Abyssal Plane Slayer task for Konar quo Maten.
Players are no longer forced to re-attack the Sire immediately after waking it, as the attack they'd be prompted to use was frequently an unhelpful one.
The respiratory systems are now affected by the bonus damage and accuracy from an imbued slayer helmet.
The NPC will now always appear above other characters or players standing on the same tile.

Shadow spells now have a 25, 50, 75 and 100% chance for shadow rush, burst, blitz, and barrage to stun the Abyssal Sire in the first phase, rather than a static 2/3 chance for any type of shadow spell.
drops.rate: Shadow spells now have a 25, 50, 75 and 100% chance for shadow rush, burst, blitz, and barrage to stun the Abyssal Sire in the first phase, rather than a static 2/3 chance for any type of shadow spell.

drops.quantity: A warning message is now given when teleporting away from Sire's chambers with the Ancient Magick teleports, as the Sire is able to drop runes for such teleports, risking casting teleporting spells instead in subsequent kills. Annakarl Teleport was the most likely teleport spell used, as its spell icon was next to that of Blood Barrage.
The rune platebody, full helm, and kiteshield drops from the Abyssal Sire are now noted.
The Abyssal Sire drop table has been improved.
Added the Abyssal Sire to the Slayer skill guide and level up message.

drops.quantity: Adamant dragons now play a sound effect when they launch their poison attack.

The Slayer tip given by Slayer masters assigning adamant dragons has been updated. Previously, the tip was "Adamant dragons can fire metal bolts right through your armour as though it weren't there. Watch out for their poison bombs too."
Adamant dragons no longer have a 1/5 chance to have their dragon bones replaced by superior dragon bones.

Adamant dragons' ranged special attack was changed from enchanted diamond bolts' Armour Piercing to enchanted ruby bolts' Blood Forfeit.
It is now more difficult for aggro to be stolen by another player whilst dealing with the special attack.

drops.quantity: The safety measure to ensure players don't get stuck under Araxxor's corpse has been refined.

Combat Achievements have been added for Araxxor. As criteria for Araxxor's speed tasks were tracked on release, these were automatically completed upon opening the Combat Achievements interface.
The "step-under" technique now works on any tile Araxxor is on, rather than just the four south-west tiles he occupies.
A new safety measure has been added to push players out of Araxxor's corpse more aggressively to ensure they don't get stuck under it.
An oversight in which players could kill Araxxor off-task, by never directly dealing damage to him, has been fixed.
Global Best times for Araxxor on the scoreboard were reset.
On Deadman Mode worlds, players can no longer enter Araxxor's lair if they're skulled.

A different attack sound has been added for Araxxor's venom spit attacks to distinguish it from his regular attacks.
The damage Araxxor deals to himself during his enrage phase whilst performing the "step-under" technique has been reduced from 25-38 to 8-12.
An active Death Charge will now restore special attack energy upon Araxxor's death.
Araxxor should now properly push players away when his corpse appears.
The timer tracking eligibility for the coagulated venom drop now stops upon Araxxor's death, rather than upon looting his corpse.
The rune platelegs and kiteshield drops are now noted when dropped.
The 1-2 prayer potion(2) drop has been replaced by 1 prayer potion(4).

drops.quantity: Players without the hard Wilderness Diary can now face Artio if they have a Callisto boss Slayer task.
The hard Wilderness diary set is required to access Artio instead of medium.

Drop quantities have been reduced for the following items:

Uncut rubies: 22 to 17
Uncut diamonds: 9 to 7
Soul runes: 200 to 150
Snapdragon seeds: 2 to 1
Grimy toadflax: 60 to 40
Artio will now wait a short period of time after respawning before attacking players.
Artio's respawn time was decreased from 26 ticks (15.6 seconds) to 11 ticks (6.6 seconds).

Access to Artio is now locked behind the medium Wilderness diary.
Artio can now be damaged by Magic attacks.
Additionally, if Artio is not already frozen and the attacking player has equipment with a total Magic accuracy greater than 0, the first attack that would freeze the boss is guaranteed to hit.
Future hits while the boss is frozen are not guaranteed to hit.
Artio's base Magic level has been increased from 1 to 90.
Artio has been added to the HiScores.

Artio’s head no longer clips when within melee range.
Artio is now immune to Ring of recoil and similar effects.

drops.quantity:
Hotfix
Reverted boss lair exit changes so only logging out when inside the arena places you above ground outside the Escape Caves.
The spawn location after leaving Venenatis, Callisto and Vet'ion have been slightly altered to place players above ground.
Players without the medium Wilderness Diary can now face Callisto if they have a Callisto boss Slayer task.
Completion of the medium Wilderness Diary is now required to face Callisto.
The minimum damage threshold required for Ironmen to be eligible for 25% of the solo loot quantity was decreased from 10% of overall damage to 7%.
drops.rate: The minimum damage threshold required for Ironmen to be eligible for 25% of the solo loot quantity was decreased from 10% of overall damage to 7%.

drops.quantity:
Drop quantities lowered for uncut rubies from 75 to 50 and uncut diamonds from 35 to 25.
Minimum loot percentage for Ironmen dealing less than 10% damage reduced from 25% of solo loot to 5% of solo loot.
drops.rate:
Drop quantities lowered for uncut rubies from 75 to 50 and uncut diamonds from 35 to 25.
Minimum loot percentage for Ironmen dealing less than 10% damage reduced from 25% of solo loot to 5% of solo loot.

drops.quantity: Callisto will now wait a short period of time after respawning before attacking players.
Callisto's respawn time was decreased from 29 ticks (17.4 seconds) to 11 ticks (6.6 seconds).

The minimum percentage of regular loot given to the top 10 players in a fight against Callisto has been increased from 15% to 25%.
The drop rate for a Callisto cub has been increased from 1/2,000 to 1/1,500.
Callisto can now drop wilderness crab teleports, mystic robe tops, mystic robe bottoms, rune kiteshields, rune platebodies, and mystic earth staves.
The weighting on certain drops as been adjusted, slightly decreasing the chance to get coins and rune pickaxes in favour of more valuable drops.
The number of rune pickaxes dropped has been increased from 3 to 5.
The number of blighted anglerfish dropped has been increased from 45 to 100.
drops.rate:
The minimum percentage of regular loot given to the top 10 players in a fight against Callisto has been increased from 15% to 25%.
The drop rate for a Callisto cub has been increased from 1/2,000 to 1/1,500.
Callisto can now drop wilderness crab teleports, mystic robe tops, mystic robe bottoms, rune kiteshields, rune platebodies, and mystic earth staves.
The weighting on certain drops as been adjusted, slightly decreasing the chance to get coins and rune pickaxes in favour of more valuable drops.
The number of rune pickaxes dropped has been increased from 3 to 5.
The number of blighted anglerfish dropped has been increased from 45 to 100.

drops.quantity:
Callisto can now be damaged by Magic attacks.
Additionally, if Callisto is not already frozen and the attacking player has equipment with a total Magic accuracy greater than 0, the first attack that would freeze the boss is guaranteed to hit.
Future hits while the boss is frozen are not guaranteed to hit.
Callisto's base Magic level has been increased from 1 to 140.
Callisto's chip damage has been removed.
Callisto's Ranged attack will no longer deal damage through Protect from Missiles.
Random events have been disabled in the Wilderness boss lairs.
Ring of wealth now works correctly for Callisto.

Increased the minimum loot reward from 0% to 15%.
Reduced maximum number of players able to receive loot from 15 to 10.
Increased quantity of base rewards.
Callisto is now immune to Ring of recoil and similar effects.
drops.rate:
Increased the minimum loot reward from 0% to 15%.
Reduced maximum number of players able to receive loot from 15 to 10.
Increased quantity of base rewards.
Callisto is now immune to Ring of recoil and similar effects.

drops.quantity:
Callisto is now located in a cave, and his combat behaviour has been adjusted.
Callisto has been graphically updated.
Callisto's 75 noted crushed nests drop was removed from its drop table, being replaced with 30 noted dragon bones.
Callisto now uses his knockback attack less frequently.
Callisto can no longer be blocked by other NPCs.
Scorpia, Venenatis, Vet'ion and Callisto now have a very slim chance of dropping a pet version of themselves when killed.
Callisto's drop table was improved and he was made immune to Magic damage. The cluster of skeletons north of him was also removed to discourage safespotting.
The drop tables for Callisto, Vet'ion, Venenatis and the Lava dragons have been buffed.

infobox.examine: I wouldn't want to eat his Porridge.
Only the true lord & king of the lands can lift his burden.

drops.quantity: Players without the hard Wilderness Diary can now face Calvar'ion if they have a Vet'ion boss Slayer task.
The hard Wilderness diary set is required to access Calvar'ion instead of medium.

Drop quantities have been reduced for the following items:

Uncut rubies: 22 to 17
Uncut diamonds: 9 to 7
Calvar'ion will now wait a short period of time after respawning before attacking players.
Calvar'ion's respawn time was decreased from 30 ticks (18 seconds) to 14 ticks (8.4 seconds).
Calvar'ion's lightning circle is now brighter and more visible.
Access to Calvar'ion is now locked behind the medium Wilderness diary.
Calvar'ion has been added to the HiScores.

Calvar’ion now only summons two hounds no matter how many players are in the fight.
Calvar’ion will now only spawn up to seven lightning strikes at one time, regardless of the number of players in the arena.
Calvar'ion is now immune to ring of recoil and similar effects.

Likes pillaging, plundering and making people take long walks off a short plank.
It looks fluffy and cute; it's probably deadly.
Big... Cow-like... But cows don't have serpent tails!
Annoying fishermen is what I do best.

drops.quantity:
Hotfix
Key master teleports were readded to the drop table, and now drop in batches of 7 instead of 3.

The lava pool attack has been adjusted to be easier to react to when it appears, especially when in melee distance.
The lava pool will now only deal damage to players when stood on, rather than in a 3x3 area around it.
Key master teleports were made tradeable but mistakenly removed from the drop table.
Cerberus now drops ranarr seeds.
Ward of Arceuus now reduces Prayer drain from demon attacks by 33%. This effect stacks multiplicatively with the Spectral Spirit Shield, meaning you'd lose 10 Prayer points per ghost at Cerberus if you're using both of these.
drops.rate:
The lava pool attack has been adjusted to be easier to react to when it appears, especially when in melee distance.
The lava pool will now only deal damage to players when stood on, rather than in a 3x3 area around it.
Key master teleports were made tradeable but mistakenly removed from the drop table.
Cerberus now drops ranarr seeds.
Ward of Arceuus now reduces Prayer drain from demon attacks by 33%. This effect stacks multiplicatively with the Spectral Spirit Shield, meaning you'd lose 10 Prayer points per ghost at Cerberus if you're using both of these.

drops.quantity: Cerberus' Magic defence has been reduced from +100 to +65.
Restored previous Red-X methods when fighting Cerberus.
Cerberus now has a 40% elemental weakness to water spells.
drops.rate: Cerberus now has a 40% elemental weakness to water spells.

drops.quantity: The Key Master will now tell players whether there are other players fighting Cerberus from any of the three Iron Winches, rather than the one the player is peeking from. Additionally, he has a new "Listen" option that conveys the same information.
Cerberus' flame attack will no longer damage players after Cerberus has died.
Cerberus now drops ensouled hellhound heads at a rate of 1/15.
Cerberus can now perform her attacks from a greater distance, to discourage safe-spotting.
Cerberus now drops infernal ashes in place of regular ashes.
A sound effect has been added to Cerberus' lava pools attack.
Several monsters, including Cerberus, were tagged as demonic, allowing demonbane weapons to work on them.
Cerberus can now walk through players.
Cerberus' lava pools, as well as the wall of flames, will now despawn when she is killed.
Cerberus now counts for the elite clue scroll step that asks players to kill a hellhound.
Summoned Souls now disappear if Cerberus dies after they were summoned instead of continuing to attack the player.
Cerberus will now take twice as long to sit down again after a period of no combat.
The Jar of Souls is now a tertiary drop.
The Tortured Souls in Cerberus' lair now wield weapons to make it easier to distinguish between them.
Players may now enter Cerberus' lair without having a hellhound task, as some players would die as they finished their task and be unable to retrieve their items.

After you foiled a plan to destroy the Grand Tree things have been quiet in the gnome world. Brimstail has found a strange machine, though, built by Oaknock the Engineer during the Gnomes' Golden Age. What does the weird device do? Why on Gielinor was it built? If you agree to help this bookworm gnome get this confusing device working, you will learn a little about gnome magicks, gnome history, and you will start to uncover a new threat (or is it an old one?) to gnome security - a threat that is a lot harder to see ...

76 Fishing [boostable] is required to fish for raw sharks yourself, but there are multiple alternatives:
Rufus' Meat Emporium in Canifis sells a single raw shark.
Frankie's Fishing Emporium in Port Piscarilius sells raw shark.
River trolls in the Enchanted Valley drop them commonly, but require access to fairy rings.
Waterfiends, combat level 115, rarely drop noted raw shark.
Mogres, combat level 60, require completion of Skippy and the Mogres,  32 Slayer [boostable], and fishing explosives to attack. They can rarely drop a raw shark.
Wintertodt can drop a raw shark after  43 Fishing, though it will be very rare, but chances increase with Fishing level.
Raw shark has a slight chance to drop from salvaging Barracuda salvage.

drops.quantity:
The King of the northern Gnomes, Narnode Shareen, is once again in need of your help. He recently decided to send an envoy of his Royal Guard, the 10th squad, to oversee the decommissioning of the Gnome owned ship-building facilities on the eastern coast of Karamja.
It has been quite some time since the 10th squad were dispatched and they have been deemed missing in action. It will be up to you, should you decide to help, to find out what fate befell the 10th squad and if possible, track them down.

If only it were so simple. Sinister forces have begun to spread through the Gnome hierarchy and threaten to unleash an unknown terror upon the world. Far across the land, the fires of vengeance are being stoked once again. Can you unravel the mystery behind the deception? Can you separate the truth from the lies? Can you decide for yourself what is real and what is not?

Our story begins with you, the hero, answering the call to adventure when Edmond, a resident of Ardougne, asks for your aid. By rescuing his daughter Elena from Plague City, the quarantined West Ardougne, you begin to unravel the mystery surrounding the disease. With her help, you discover the plague is a hoax - a plot by King Lathas to section off the West Ardougne. By confronting him, you find out this was done to protect the rest of Gielinor from the threat in the elven lands.
The king sends you on a mission to travel through the Underground Pass and help his ally, Lord Iorwerth, in eradicating his brother King Tyras who threatens to revive the mysterious Dark Lord. After an arduous journey through the pass, you meet with Iorwerth and his forces to end Tyras' evil once and for all.
Upon your return to Lathas you are intercepted by Arianwyn, a rebel elf who opposes Lord Iorwerth. He informs you of Lathas and Iorwerth's deception. They manipulated you into removing their final opposition and were now free to bring the Dark Lord back to Gielinor for their own intentions. You work with the elven rebellion to discover the purpose of the plague was to disguise the digsite of the long lost Temple of Light. An ancient place that is key to bringing back the Dark Lord.

To make amends for your past mistakes and put a halt in King Lathas' and Lord Iorwerth's plans, you solve the intricate light puzzle designed to protect the Death Altar within the temple. After sealing off the temple and preventing the return of the Dark Lord, it's now time to turn your attention to King Lathas and Lord Iorwerth to end their schemes once and for all in Song of the Elves.

Several changes are made to the Underground Pass quest, along with the release of Song of the Elves. These changes include, but are not limited to:

The entire Underground Pass quest now takes place in an instance.
Koftik no longer appears in multiple locations inside the dungeon, during the quest. Instead, he moves along with the player's progress, and a backpack containing oily cloth is left behind near the rope bridge instead.
The three paladins (Sir Carl, Sir Harry, and Sir Jerro) no longer respawn after their badges have been dropped in the well. Similarly, one cannot get duplicates of the orbs of light.
The patches of swamp found further in the dungeon are removed. Previously, there were swamps located near the blessed spiders just across the rope bridge, as well as inside the Thieving shortcut area in the first area with Agility obstacles.
Iban's shadow, ashes and dove are now automatically applied to the doll of iban when obtained with the doll in the inventory.
Iban has some dialogue when you first enter his temple and now only attacks when there is someone inside.
Kamen's homemade brew no longer damages the player between 3-5 Hitpoints.
The player no longer receives 30 fire runes and 15 death runes when throwing the doll of Iban into the Well of Voyage.
